# FamilyActivityData

**Class**

An interface to the user’s family activity data.

## Declaration

```swift
class FamilyActivityData
```

## Overview

To fetch a user’s family activity data, use [doc://com.apple.FamilyControls/documentation/FamilyControls/FamilyActivityData/installedApplications], [doc://com.apple.FamilyControls/documentation/FamilyControls/FamilyActivityData/visitedWebDomains] or [doc://com.apple.FamilyControls/documentation/FamilyControls/FamilyActivityData/activityCategories] based on the type of data you’re interested in.



## Instance Properties

- **activityCategories**: The set of all possible activity categories.
- **installedApplications**: An array of applications installed by the current user.
- **visitedWebDomains**: An array of web domains visited by the current user.

## Type Properties

- **shared**: The shared Family Activity Data instance.
